problem_solved: Laboratories need modern informatics solutions to manage increasing test volumes, integrate data from diverse sources, and digitalize workflows for clinical diagnostics and public health testing.

Cloud-native architecture enabling modern laboratory digital transformation
Multi-discipline support covering 22 specialist research and test disciplines across 9 industries
Integration capabilities connecting laboratory data from diverse sources
business_model: SaaS subscription model with configurable modules; implementation and professional services
why_varden_should_care: Market leader with #1 position in clinical lab systems globally and 7,000+ customers. Strong European presence (UK-based) with proven ability to serve public health and clinical pathology markets. SaaS model enables scalable deployments. 40+ years of laboratory expertise with 1,450+ lab professionals. Significant market opportunity as labs digitize post-COVID.
